findings.name: analytics-postgres
findings.waste_reason: db.r5.large RDS instance averaging 0.3% CPU and 2 database connections over 90 days. Storage I/O is near zero. The database appears to be provisioned for a workload that either migrated or was decommissioned.
findings.recommendation: Take a final snapshot and delete the instance. If the data is still needed, consider exporting to S3 via RDS snapshot export.

findings.name: staging-api-server
findings.waste_reason: Instance has been in stopped state for 47 days. No CloudTrail activity since May 1. The associated EBS volumes (120 GiB gp3) continue accruing charges while the instance is stopped.
findings.recommendation: Terminate the instance and delete attached EBS volumes. Create an AMI first if you need to preserve the configuration for future use.

findings.name: orphaned-data-vol
findings.waste_reason: 1000 GiB gp3 EBS volume has been unattached for 62 days. Zero read/write operations. No EC2 instance is associated.
findings.recommendation: Snapshot the volume for archival, then delete it. If the data is no longer needed, delete directly.

findings.waste_reason: NAT Gateway processed 0 bytes over 90 days. The associated private subnet has no running instances. The gateway is incurring hourly charges ($0.045/hr) with zero data transfer.
findings.recommendation: Delete the NAT Gateway and release the associated Elastic IP. Verify the private subnet route table no longer references it.

findings.waste_reason: Elastic IP not associated with any running instance. AWS charges $0.005/hr for unattached EIPs.
findings.recommendation: Release the Elastic IP. If it was reserved for a specific service, update the service configuration to use a new allocation when needed.

executive_summary: Scanned 847 resources across 1 AWS account (us-east-1, us-west-2). Found 5 idle resources with $504.35/month estimated waste. Two high-priority findings — a stopped EC2 instance and an underutilized RDS database — account for 77% of total waste. Recommend immediate cleanup of the unattached EBS volume and orphaned NAT Gateway.
